crons._comment: Warmer — pings /api/health every 5 minutes so the tRPC + dashboard functions don't go cold during business hours. Vercel free/Hobby allows daily; Pro allows minute-level. Adjust schedule per your plan.

_comment_functions: Memory bumps. Default 1024MB cold-starts at ~800ms-1.2s; 2048MB cuts that to ~400-600ms because Vercel's Lambda allocates more vCPU at higher memory. Apply only to user-facing routes — crons and webhooks can stay default since latency doesn't matter there.
